purpose: Manual STALCRAFT Wiki screenshot observations that UltimateBuild treats as source-truth fixtures for calculator parity. Keep raw internal calculations unrounded; compare display values at UI precision.

calculationNotes: Q115 values support quality scaling from hidden full-precision Q100 bases, but not from already-rounded Q100 display values.
Displayed Q100 movement 0.70 * 1.15 = 0.805 would half-up round to 0.81, but observed is 0.80; therefore Q100 display 0.70 is rounded from hidden raw <= about 0.699999.
Displayed Q100 biological 0.56 * 1.15 = 0.644 would round to 0.64, but observed is 0.63; hidden raw Q100 biological is likely about 0.548 rather than displayed 0.56.
Psy-emissions negative beneficial value scales by quality in magnitude: -1.28 displayed baseline -> observed -1.47, consistent with hidden raw -1.2783.
At Q115 threshold, switching from Unordinary to Special leaves positives and Psy-emissions unchanged but lowers Biological infection from 0.63 to 0.53.
This supports threshold rarity behavior for Snares biological infection, analogous in structure to Cursed Rose radiation.
At Q130 threshold, Snares Special keeps Biological infection at 0.63 while positives/beneficial stats scale from hidden full-precision bases.
Compared with Q130 Rare, positives and Psy-emissions remain unchanged; Biological infection is the rarity-sensitive harmful stat.
At Q130 threshold, switching from Special to Rare leaves positive/beneficial Snares stats unchanged but lowers Biological infection from 0.63 to 0.53.
This confirms Snares biological threshold-rarity behavior repeats at Q130.
Q145 Rare matched the predicted Snares quality scaling for positives/Psy-emissions and keeps the first-threshold Biological infection value 0.63.
At Q145 threshold, compare with Exclusive: positives and Psy-emissions unchanged; Biological infection improves by 0.10.
Q145 Exclusive matched the predicted Snares quality scaling for positives/Psy-emissions and the second-threshold Biological infection improvement to 0.53.
This confirms the Snares biological rarity-threshold pattern repeats at Q145.
Wicked Hedgehog Q100/L0/Unordinary contributes Reaction to laceration 0.90% to the current build.
Its Radiation, Temperature, and Biological infection reductions display as -1.28 each; do not use ordinary/normalized -1.09 for the Unordinary build context.
Wicked Hedgehog Q100/L0/Unordinary contributes Reaction to laceration 0.90% to the current build.
Its Radiation, Temperature, and Biological infection reductions display as -1.28 each; do not use ordinary/normalized -1.09 for the Unordinary build context.

Wicked Hedgehog Q130/L0/Special scales all visible Q100/L0/Unordinary stats by quality: Stamina 13.90 -> 18.07, Movement 0.50 -> 0.65, Running 0.70 -> 0.91, Radiation/Temperature/Biological infection -1.28 -> -1.66, Reaction to laceration 0.90 -> 1.17.
Compare with Q130/L0/Rare: no visible threshold-rarity change for Wicked Hedgehog at this cap.
Wicked Hedgehog Q130/L0/Rare matches Q130/L0/Special exactly in the visible artifact panel values.
Unlike Snares Biological infection or Cursed Rose Radiation, no Wicked Hedgehog visible stat changed between the two legal Q130 rarities in these screenshots.

Cycle Q175/L0/Legendary artifact panel matches quality scaling from Q100 raw bases: Stamina 15.4 * 1.75 = 26.95, Biological infection -4.08 * 1.75 = -7.14, Bleeding -0.70 * 1.75 = -1.225 displayed as -1.22.
For Cycle, the Q175 Legendary screenshot uses the strongest/beneficial endpoint for all visible stats; negative Biological infection and Bleeding are beneficial reductions.
Cycle Q175/L0/Unique artifact panel matches Q175/L0/Legendary exactly: no visible Legendary-to-Unique threshold change for Cycle at quality 175.
Values match direct quality scaling from Q100 endpoint values: Stamina 15.40 * 1.75 = 26.95, Biological infection -4.08 * 1.75 = -7.14, Bleeding -0.70 * 1.75 = -1.225 displayed as -1.22.
Chilly Q100/L0/Ordinary in the new Berloga 6 build replaces Coil. Vitality, beneficial negative Temperature, Frost, and Burning match normalized Wiki endpoint values at quality 100.
In final Result, Chilly contributes Vitality +2.70%, Temperature -0.38, Frost +1.00, and Burning -0.40; Coil-only Carry weight and Resistance to fire disappear.
Chilly Q100/L0/Unordinary changes Frost from the Ordinary endpoint 1.00 to 0.90 while Vitality, Temperature, and Burning remain 2.70%, -0.38, and -0.40.
This corrects the active new-build context: the Chilly row is Q100/L0/Unordinary, not Ordinary.
Chilly Q130/L0/Special: Vitality, Temperature, and Burning match quality scaling from Q100 endpoints: 2.70*1.30=3.51, -0.384*1.30=-0.50, -0.40*1.30=-0.52.
Frost remains at the first-rarity harmful endpoint 1.00 for Q130 Special; compare Q130 Rare Frost 0.85.
Chilly Q130/L0/Rare matches Q130 Special for Vitality, Temperature, and Burning.
Switching from Special to Rare lowers harmful Frost from 1.00 to 0.85 while leaving other visible stats unchanged, matching the threshold-rarity pattern seen on some harmful stats.

rarityThresholdRuleFromOwner.description: Hard quality caps have two rarity choices. In-between qualities use the second rarity from the previous cap until the next cap.

testBuildContexts.description: Owner-provided full build context used for rarity threshold/final stat validation. Only Cursed Rose rarity changes between ordinary/unordinary Q100 L15 selected-additional screenshots; same Berloga 6 container and other artifacts.

artifacts.name: Wicked Hedgehog
artifacts.note: Displayed as Wicked Hedgeh… in screenshot
artifacts.calculationNote: Wicked Hedgehog is the source of build-level Reaction to laceration 0.90% in current tests; screenshot-confirmed Q100/L0/Unordinary harmful reductions are Radiation/Temperature/Biological infection -1.28 each. Keep it fixed when isolating Snares deltas.

artifacts.name: Wicked Hedgehog
artifacts.calculationNote: Wicked Hedgehog is the source of build-level Reaction to laceration 0.90% in current tests; screenshot-confirmed Q100/L0/Unordinary harmful reductions are Radiation/Temperature/Biological infection -1.28 each. Keep it fixed when isolating Snares deltas.

testBuildContexts.note: Rarity is not visible in the container-list screenshot; The owner clarified the artifacts in this build are Q100/L0 and Unordinary.

New build screenshot replaces Coil with Chilly. Latest Chilly artifact-panel screenshot confirms Chilly is Q100/L0/Unordinary: Frost 0.90, not the Ordinary endpoint 1.00. Other visible container-list rows show +0 100%, with prior fixtures supplying established Q100/L0 Unordinary baselines.

calculationNotes: Result panel uses Reaction to laceration context. Running speed is recorded as +3.53% from the user-provided screenshot description and consistency with Snares artifact delta; automated OCR/vision had a conflicting negative sign read.

Q130 Special Biological infection final remains -4.74, matching the Q100 Ordinary and Q115 Unordinary result despite higher quality; Snares biological is rarity-threshold-sensitive and not a simple positive quality scale in final aggregation.
Result panel uses Reaction to laceration context for Snares Q130 Rare.
Compared with Q130 Special result, Biological infection improves from -4.74 to -4.83 while visible positive/beneficial stats remain unchanged.

Running speed is recorded as +3.53% from the user-provided screenshot description and consistency with prior Q130 Special arithmetic; automated OCR/vision again produced a conflicting negative-sign read.
Q145 Rare Result panel matched the prediction in Reaction to laceration context.
Movement speed 2.71%, Running speed 3.68%, Laceration protection 25.23, Psy-emissions -1.86, Biological infection -4.74.
Q145 Exclusive Result panel matched prediction in Reaction to laceration context.
Compared with Q145 Rare result, Biological infection improves from -4.74 to -4.83 while visible positives and Psy-emissions remain unchanged.
Baseline all-Q100/L0/Unordinary build with Reaction to laceration selected.
Wicked Hedgehog supplies Reaction to laceration 0.90%; Snares supplies Laceration protection 17.40 and Psy-emissions -1.28 in this baseline.
Effective health 122.80 / Vitality 0.90% / Stamina regeneration 0.90% are Result-context outputs when Reaction to laceration is selected.
Second confirmation screenshot for baseline all-Q100/L0/Unordinary build with Reaction to laceration selected.
Matches img_061fc264a76c.jpg exactly; confirms Wicked Hedgehog fixed Reaction to laceration 0.90% and baseline result values.
Full build baseline with only Wicked Hedgehog overridden to Q130/L0/Special and Result category Reaction to laceration selected.
Positive/derived Wicked Hedgehog deltas pass through directly: Movement +0.15, Running +0.21, Stamina +4.17, Reaction/Vitality/Stamina regeneration +0.27.

Radiation and Temperature final deltas match Berloga 6 passthrough on the Wicked Hedgehog artifact delta: -0.38 * 0.215 ~= -0.08 displayed. Biological infection improves directly by about -0.38 in the displayed Result panel.
Full build baseline with only Wicked Hedgehog overridden to Q130/L0/Rare and Result category Reaction to laceration selected.
Matches the Q130/L0/Special Wicked Hedgehog Result panel exactly, confirming no visible Q130 Special-to-Rare threshold change for Wicked Hedgehog in artifact or Result panels.
Full build baseline with only Cycle overridden to Q175/L0/Legendary and Result category Reaction to laceration selected.
Matches the paired Q175 Cycle Result screenshot exactly; no visible Legendary-to-Unique threshold change for Cycle at quality 175.
Final deltas from Q100 baseline are direct for Cycle Stamina/Bio/Bleeding: Stamina 29.30 -> 40.85 (+11.55), Biological -4.80 -> -7.86 (-3.06), Bleeding -0.70 -> -1.22 (-0.52).
Full build baseline with only Cycle overridden to Q175/L0/Unique and Result category Reaction to laceration selected.
Matches the paired Q175 Cycle Result screenshot exactly; no visible Legendary-to-Unique threshold change for Cycle at quality 175.
Final deltas from Q100 baseline are direct for Cycle Stamina/Bio/Bleeding: Stamina 29.30 -> 40.85 (+11.55), Biological -4.80 -> -7.86 (-3.06), Bleeding -0.70 -> -1.22 (-0.52).
Latest confirmation screenshot corrects the Chilly build to Q100/L0/Unordinary: Frost is 0.90, not 1.00.

Matches delta prediction from the prior all-Q100/L0 baseline after swapping Coil out for Chilly: Movement drops 2.40 -> 1.20, Running drops 3.25 -> 1.65, Carry weight and Resistance to fire disappear, Chilly adds Burning -0.40, Frost 0.90, and Vitality +2.70.

Displayed Vitality is 3.60% = Chilly 2.70% + Reaction-to-laceration context 0.90%. Temperature is -1.66 = Chilly -0.38 + Wicked Hedgehog -1.28, confirming beneficial negative thermal accumulation is effectively direct while positive thermal harm from Coil was removed.
Radiation and Biological infection remain at the established baseline values 0.45 and -4.80 because the swap affects neither radiation nor biological contributors.
Full build with only Chilly overridden to Q130/L0/Special and Result category Reaction to laceration selected.

Result deltas from the Q100/L0/Unordinary Chilly build are direct for Chilly-visible values: Vitality 3.60 -> 4.41 (+0.81), Temperature -1.66 -> -1.78 (-0.12), Burning -0.40 -> -0.52 (-0.12), Frost 0.90 -> 1.00 (+0.10).
Unaffected build stats remain unchanged: Movement 1.20, Running 1.65, Biological -4.80, Radiation 0.45.
Full build with only Chilly overridden to Q130/L0/Rare and Result category Reaction to laceration selected.
Matches the Q130 Rare prediction exactly: identical to Q130 Special result except Frost improves from 1.00 to 0.85.
Confirms Chilly Q130 Special-to-Rare threshold-rarity behavior affects Frost only in the visible Result panel.
